<!--
Thanks for the PR. Please fill out the sections below; small / trivial PRs
can use the abbreviated form (just "What" + "Why").

Format-checks before submitting:
  - [ ] `npm run test:all` passes locally (`100 passed + 1 skipped`)
  - [ ] If this fixes a regression, a test that fails without your fix
        has been added (see docs/testing.md)
  - [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): summary` style
-->

## What

<!-- One or two sentences describing the change. -->

## Why

<!--
The "why" matters more than the "what" — the diff already shows what.
Link the issue this fixes if any: `Fixes #N`.

For bug fixes:
  - What symptom were you / a user seeing?
  - What was the root cause?
  - Why is THIS the right fix vs alternatives?

For features:
  - What user need does this serve?
  - Why now, why this scope?
-->

## How tested

<!--
For UI changes: include a screenshot or short video (test-results/
artifacts work great). For motion/transition changes, describe the
sampling pattern you used (see docs/testing.md "Motion test pattern").
For bug fixes: name the regression test you added in tests/visual/ or
tests/e2e/.
-->

## Docs

<!--
If this changes behavior, what docs were updated? At minimum check:
  - [ ] README.md feature list (user-visible behavior)
  - [ ] docs/architecture.md (data flow / state machines)
  - [ ] docs/decisions.md (non-obvious bug fix rationale)
  - [ ] docs/known-issues.md (new tradeoff / limitation)
  - [ ] CHANGELOG.md (notable change)
-->
